name: release-approval
description: Operate one role-bound release approval controller through MCP, Skill, standalone CLI, and unattended OS scheduling.

interface.longDescription: Use one credential-free configuration and one controller across MCP, Skill, standalone CLI, and a headless OS scheduler. Explicit open-page creates a fresh one-time loopback approval session; scheduled run_once never opens UI.
defaultPrompt: Run release approval setup with zero manual JSON editing.
Run the headless release approval scan and show status.
Diagnose the OS scheduler and local audit chain.
Open a fresh one-time approval page for a pending event.
